sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"Top row: {ascii_lines[0].count('B')} B's, {ascii_lines[0].count('W')} W's")

nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue square id={node['id']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Let me check the last transition to see what changed
if last_transition:
    print(f"Last action: {last_transition.action}")
    print(f"Board changed: {last_transition.after_frame.ascii != last_transition.before_frame.ascii}")

# Let me try pressing SPACE to see if it completes the level
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
